# Custom 4 MB partition table for Overhe: # Dual-OTA 1.75 MB app slots (ElegantOTA needs two slots
# LittleFS. Rebalanced up from 1.5 MB app slots once the astro core + tabs pushed
# flash past ~88%; the regional airport subset (m5) + reduced star catalog (m9) +
# TLE cache + settings fit in ~448 KB.
# NOTE: the data partition must be LABELLED "spiffs" — Arduino's LittleFS.begin()
# looks for that label by default.
